scripts.deploy: shx rm -rf ../publish/web && pnpm nx run-many -t deploy -p @docspace/client @docspace/login @docspace/doceditor @docspace/management @docspace/sdk && shx cp -r public ../publish/web/ && node common/scripts/minify-common-locales.js
scripts.deploy:lite: shx rm -rf ../publish/web && pnpm nx run-many -t deploy -p @docspace/client @docspace/login @docspace/doceditor && shx cp -r public ../publish/web/ && node common/scripts/minify-common-locales.js
scripts.deploy:preview: shx rm -rf ../publish/web && pnpm nx run-many -t build:deploy -p @docspace/login @docspace/doceditor @docspace/management @docspace/sdk && pnpm nx deploy @docspace/client && node common/scripts/preview/deploy.js && shx cp -r public ../publish/web/ && node common/scripts/minify-common-locales.js
scripts.wipe: pnpm nx reset && shx rm -rf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml packages/**/node_modules
scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.CI) { try { require('child_process').execSync('git --version', {stdio: 'ignore'}); require('child_process').execSync('lefthook install', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } catch (e) { console.error('Lefthook installation skipped:', e.message); } }" && npm --prefix ./common/tests ci
scripts.update-ui-kit-lock: mv pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml.bak && cd libs/ui-kit && pnpm install --lockfile-only; cd ../.. && mv pnpm-workspace.yaml.bak pnpm-workspace.yaml
scripts.update-translation-app-lock: npm --prefix common/translation-app/frontend install --package-lock-only && npm --prefix common/translation-app/backend install --package-lock-only
